stock_uncle_insight.date_header: 6/18 法人與主力大戶主要買超股票

buyer_groups.group_title: 1. 外資大戶：狂掃傳產龍頭與部分金融，對作面板與半導體

stocks.description: 肖年仔，你看這中鋼，外資狂掃了近 31.99 萬張！這擺明是看好原物料行情，或是拿來當避險部位，畢竟國際局勢不穩，通膨壓力又來了，這種傳產龍頭就是資金的避風港啦！
台塑也被外資買了近 14.23 萬張，跟中鋼一樣，都是傳產龍頭，這種穩定的標的，外資大戶在市場震盪時，就是喜歡拿來壓艙，穩住陣腳。
聯電外資買了近 6.58 萬張，但投信卻在倒貨，這就是標準的法人對作。外資可能覺得聯電跌深了，或是看好成熟製程的訂單，但投信可能覺得還有壓，肖年仔別黑白猜，看清楚主力意圖。
友達外資買了近 5.24 萬張，面板股最近消息面多空交雜，外資買友達卻賣彩晶、群創，這表示他們不是全面看好面板，而是有選擇性地布局，或是短線操作。
旺宏外資買了近 3.14 萬張，記憶體族群最近也是話題不斷，外資可能在低檔偷偷吃貨，準備等題材發酵拉高出貨。
永豐金外資買了近 2.35 萬張，同時投信也在買，這檔金融股有雙法人加持，顯示在市場震盪時，金融股的防禦性還是很受青睞。
華航外資買了近 1.95 萬張，航空股之前漲多拉回，現在外資又開始回補，可能是看好暑假旺季效應，或是油價波動後的避險操作。

buyer_groups.group_title: 2. 投信大戶（本土國家隊）：鎖碼金融股作帳，對作外資

stocks.description: 兆豐金投信狂掃近 3.54 萬張，這就是典型的投信作帳行情啦！肖年仔，看到投信這樣大買金融股，就知道他們要拉高淨值，準備跟基金投資人交待了。
遠傳投信買了近 2.35 萬張，電信股也是防禦型標的，在市場不確定性高的時候，投信喜歡抱這種穩定的股票，進可攻退可守。
永豐金投信買了近 2.27 萬張，跟外資同步買超，這檔金融股有雙法人共識，代表短期內有支撐，但肖年仔別傻傻追高，要看清楚是真買還是假買。
第一金投信買了近 2.03 萬張，又是金融股！本土國家隊就是愛金融，作帳季節到了，這些金控股就是他們的提款機，拉高出貨的好工具。
臻鼎-KY投信買了近 1.97 萬張，但外資卻在賣，這也是法人對作。投信可能看好PCB產業的下半年展望，或是趁外資倒貨時接刀。
群創投信買了近 1.78 萬張，但外資卻在狂賣近 2.98 萬張，這對作的力道很強。投信可能覺得面板跌深有反彈空間，但外資卻在割韭菜，肖年仔別傻傻地去接刀啊！

buyer_groups.group_title: 3. 內資主力與實戶：短線操作半導體與面板，避險盤也來湊熱鬧

stocks.description: 自營商買了近 0.62 萬張聯電，這量不大，但跟外資同向，顯示他們也想搭個順風車。自營商的單通常比較短線，肖年仔要小心，別被他們拉高出貨了。
自營商買了近 0.30 萬張群創，這跟投信同向，但外資卻是大賣。自營商這種買法，很可能是避險盤，或是看準短線反彈，準備隔日沖倒貨。
自營商買了近 0.23 萬張富邦科技ETF，這就是典型的避險操作，不想單壓個股，就買ETF來分散風險，或是作為權證避險的部位。
自營商買了近 0.15 萬張友達，跟外資同向。面板股最近波動大，自營商這種小量買進，通常是短線進出，肖年仔別以為是鎖碼，小心被套牢。
自營商買了近 0.13 萬張力積電，這也是半導體族群。自營商對這種有題材的股票，通常是快進快出，賺個價差就跑，別想跟他們玩波段。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略一：高檔避險與資金避風港（金融、傳產龍頭）
strategies.strategy_content: 肖年仔，你看國際新聞說中東局勢緊張，油價又飆高，通膨壓力山大，美股期貨也跌。這種時候，聰明的大戶會把資金從高風險的科技股撤出來，轉往那些有防禦性、抗通膨特性的標的。外資狂掃中鋼、台塑、台玻這些傳產龍頭，就是看準原物料上漲的利多，或是當成通膨避險。而投信和外資同步買進金融股，更是典型的資金避風港操作，這些金控股殖利率高、股價波動小，在市場震盪時就是最好的防禦工事，也是投信作帳的好工具。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略二：半導體與面板的法人對作與短線博弈
strategies.strategy_content: 半導體跟面板族群，這次很明顯就是法人在對作。外資買聯電、友達、旺宏，但同時又在賣彩晶、群創、華邦電。投信則是買群創、南亞科，卻賣聯電。自營商也來參一咖，買聯電、群創、友達。這表示市場對這些產業的看法非常分歧，沒有一致的方向。外資可能在做產業輪動，把資金從漲多的個股換到相對低檔的，而投信則可能在趁機拉抬部分個股作帳。肖年仔，這種對作盤最容易被割韭菜，沒有真本事就別亂接刀，很容易被兩邊主力夾殺。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略三：投信作帳行情鎖碼金融股
strategies.strategy_content: 本土國家隊投信，這次大買兆豐金、永豐金、第一金、華南金，這根本就是教科書等級的作帳行情！每到季底或半年底，投信為了美化基金績效，就會鎖碼這些權值大、股性穩定的金融股，把股價拉高。肖年仔，這時候看到投信狂買，別以為是大利多就傻傻追高，他們可能只是為了作帳，等時間一到，這些股票就可能被倒貨，讓你接最後一棒。

stock_uncle_insight.summary: 肖年仔，今天市場就是一個字：亂！外資在傳產跟金融找避風港，投信狂拉金融股作帳，半導體跟面板則是法人對作。這種盤勢，沒有真功夫的韭菜們，最好是多看少動，別黑白買，不然很容易被主力割韭菜！

top_brokerages_analysis.uncle_logic: 高盛這外資大咖，狂買中鋼近 11.20 萬張，這絕對不是隔日沖的小打小鬧。這擺明是看好原物料行情，或是把中鋼當成通膨避險的長線部位，準備鎖碼波段操作！
凱基台北買聯電近 0.25 萬張，肖年仔，這分點是出了名的隔日沖大戶！買這種權值股，通常就是想搭個短線順風車，隔天高開就倒貨，賺個便當錢，你可別傻傻地跟著追高啊。
元大投信買兆豐金近 1.59 萬張，這就是本土國家隊的作帳部隊！他們就是要拉抬基金淨值，把金融股鎖碼，讓帳面好看。肖年仔，這不是給你進場的訊號，是給你看出貨機會的訊號！
摩根大通這外資大戶，賣彩晶近 2.39 萬張，跟外資整體賣超彩晶的趨勢一致。這可能是對面板股短線看法保守，或是之前有賺錢，現在趁機獲利了結，準備把資金轉到其他地方去。

english_professor_news.title: Meta’s CEO Just Promised Superintelligence. He Thinks Everyone Will Have It

level1_blind.text:
Meta (META) posted $56 billion in Q1 revenue, up 33%, as Zuckerberg pledged to deliver personal superintelligence to billions of users.

Meta raised 2026 capex to $145 billion while Muse Spark, its first superintelligence model, drove double-digit growth in AI sessions per user.

Analysts set an $827 consensus target with 57 buys and zero sells, even as shares fell 16% from the earnings filing price on execution concerns.

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Meta didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

Mark Zuckerberg opened Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META)'s Q1 2026 earnings call with a sentence that would sound deranged coming from almost any other CEO: "We're on track to deliver personal superintelligence to billions of people." It was the thesis.

The claim landed alongside numbers that, for once, support the swagger. Meta posted Q1 revenue of $56.31 billion, up 33% year over year, EPS of $10.44 against a $6.6587 consensus, and net income of $26.77 billion. Roughly $3.13 of that EPS came from an $8.03 billion tax benefit tied to Treasury guidance on capitalized R&D, but the operating engine is real: ad impressions rose 19% and average price per ad rose 12%.

Zuckerberg's definition is consumer-facing. "Our goal is not just to deliver Meta AI as an assistant, but to deliver agents that can understand your goals and then work day and night to help you achieve them," he said. He drew a sharp line against rivals: "I hear a lot of people out there talk about how AI is going to replace people. Instead, I think that AI is going to amplify people's ability to do what they want."

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Meta didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

level2_keywords.meaning: 各位同學，『revenue』指的是公司在一定期間內，透過銷售商品或提供服務所獲得的總收入，也就是我們常說的「營收」。這是衡量公司規模和市場表現的重要指標喔。
level2_keywords.example: Meta's Q1 revenue surged by 33%, indicating strong market performance.

level2_keywords.meaning: 『Capex』是『Capital Expenditure』的縮寫，在財經界是指企業用於購買、升級或維護實物資產（如建築、設備、技術等）的資金，也就是「資本支出」。這通常代表公司對未來成長的投資。
level2_keywords.example: Meta significantly increased its 2026 capex to $145 billion, signaling aggressive investment in AI infrastructure.

level2_keywords.meaning: 『Superintelligence』指的是超越人類智慧的智能，它不僅能理解和學習，還能自主創造和解決複雜問題。在科技界，這代表 AI 發展的終極目標，具有顛覆性的潛力。
level2_keywords.example: Zuckerberg pledged to deliver personal superintelligence to billions of users, aiming to redefine human-AI interaction.

level2_keywords.meaning: 『Consensus target』在金融市場中，是指多位分析師對某支股票未來股價或公司財務表現預期的「共識目標價」或「共識預期」。它反映了市場對該公司前景的普遍看法。
level2_keywords.example: Analysts set an $827 consensus target for Meta, reflecting optimism despite recent share fluctuations.

level2_keywords.meaning: 『EPS』是『Earnings Per Share』的縮寫，也就是「每股盈餘」。它是衡量公司獲利能力的重要指標，計算方式是將公司的淨利潤除以流通在外的普通股總數。EPS 越高，通常代表公司獲利能力越好。
level2_keywords.example: Meta's Q1 EPS of $10.44 significantly beat the consensus, showcasing robust profitability.

english_professor_news.level2_context:
各位同學，這篇新聞主要在講 Meta 在 2026 年第一季的財報表現，以及執行長祖克柏對於 AI 未來的宏大願景。我們可以看到，Meta 的營收和每股盈餘都表現亮眼，這顯示了他們在廣告業務上的強勁復甦。然而，更值得注意的是，祖克柏大膽承諾將為數十億用戶提供『個人化超級智慧』，並且大幅提高了資本支出，這代表 Meta 正全力投入 AI 基礎設施和模型開發。

這背後的產業脈絡是，隨著生成式 AI 技術的爆發，科技巨頭們都在競相投入大量資源，力求在 AI 領域取得領先地位。Meta 過去在元宇宙的投資雖然巨大，但現在他們將重心轉向 AI，試圖透過 AI 代理人（agents）來重新定義用戶體驗，並與其他 AI 競爭者區隔開來。祖克柏強調 AI 是要『放大』人類的能力，而非取代人類，這也反映了他在 AI 倫理和應用方向上的思考。

對市場來說，Meta 的財報數據雖然亮眼，但其股價仍因對未來執行力的擔憂而有所波動。分析師們雖然給出了高共識目標價，但市場仍在觀察 Meta 如何將這些巨大的 AI 投資轉化為實際的營收成長和獲利。這也提醒我們，在高速發展的科技產業中，即使是巨頭，也需要不斷創新和有效執行，才能維持競爭力。

level3_translation.sentence: Meta (META) posted $56 billion in Q1 revenue, up 33%, as Zuckerberg pledged to deliver personal superintelligence to billions of users.
level3_translation.translation: Meta（META）第一季營收達到 560 億美元，年增 33%，同時祖克柏承諾將為數十億用戶提供個人化的超級智慧。

level3_translation.sentence: Meta raised 2026 capex to $145 billion while Muse Spark, its first superintelligence model, drove double-digit growth in AI sessions per user.
level3_translation.translation: Meta 將 2026 年的資本支出提高到 1450 億美元，而其首個超級智慧模型 Muse Spark 則帶動了每位用戶的 AI 使用時長達到雙位數成長。

level3_translation.sentence: Analysts set an $827 consensus target with 57 buys and zero sells, even as shares fell 16% from the earnings filing price on execution concerns.
level3_translation.translation: 分析師們設定了 827 美元的共識目標價，其中有 57 個「買入」評級和零個「賣出」評級，儘管如此，Meta 股價仍因對執行力的擔憂，從財報公布價格下跌了 16%。

level3_translation.sentence: Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Meta didn't make the cut.
level3_translation.translation: 立即行動：那位在 2010 年就精準預測 NVIDIA 的分析師，剛公布了他的十大 AI 股票名單——而 Meta 並未入選。

level3_translation.sentence: Grab the names FREE today.
level3_translation.translation: 今天就免費獲取這些股票名稱吧。

level3_translation.sentence: Mark Zuckerberg opened Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META)'s Q1 2026 earnings call with a sentence that would sound deranged coming from almost any other CEO: "We're on track to deliver personal superintelligence to billions of people."
level3_translation.translation: 馬克·祖克柏在 Meta Platforms（那斯達克代號：META）2026 年第一季財報電話會議上，開場說了一句話，這句話如果出自其他任何執行長之口，聽起來都會很瘋狂：「我們正朝著為數十億人提供個人化超級智慧的目標邁進。」

level3_translation.sentence: It was the thesis.
level3_translation.translation: 這就是他的核心論點。

level3_translation.sentence: The claim landed alongside numbers that, for once, support the swagger.
level3_translation.translation: 這次，這個宣稱伴隨著的財報數據，確實支持了 Meta 的自信。

level3_translation.sentence: Meta posted Q1 revenue of $56.31 billion, up 33% year over year, EPS of $10.44 against a $6.6587 consensus, and net income of $26.77 billion.
level3_translation.translation: Meta 公布第一季營收為 563.1 億美元，年增 33%，每股盈餘（EPS）為 10.44 美元，遠高於市場共識的 6.6587 美元，淨利潤則達到 267.7 億美元。

level3_translation.sentence: Roughly $3.13 of that EPS came from an $8.03 billion tax benefit tied to Treasury guidance on capitalized R&D, but the operating engine is real: ad impressions rose 19% and average price per ad rose 12%.
level3_translation.translation: 其中約 3.13 美元的每股盈餘來自於與美國財政部針對研發資本化指引相關的 80.3 億美元稅務優惠，但其營運引擎確實強勁：廣告曝光量成長了 19%，平均廣告價格也上漲了 12%。

level3_translation.sentence: Zuckerberg's definition is consumer-facing.
level3_translation.translation: 祖克柏對超級智慧的定義是面向消費者的。

level3_translation.sentence: "Our goal is not just to deliver Meta AI as an assistant, but to deliver agents that can understand your goals and then work day and night to help you achieve them," he said.
level3_translation.translation: 他說：「我們的目標不只是提供 Meta AI 作為一個助理，而是要提供能夠理解你的目標，然後日以繼夜地幫助你實現這些目標的『代理人』。」

level3_translation.sentence: He drew a sharp line against rivals: "I hear a lot of people out there talk about how AI is going to replace people.
level3_translation.translation: 他明確劃清了與競爭對手的界線：「我聽到很多人在談論 AI 將如何取代人類。

level3_translation.sentence: Instead, I think that AI is going to amplify people's ability to do what they want."
level3_translation.translation: 相反地，我認為 AI 將會『放大』人們實現其願望的能力。」

english_professor_news.title: Why Does Donald Trump Like Marvell Technology (MRVL)?

level1_blind.text:
Marvell Technology (NASDAQ:MRVL) is another favorite stock of Donald Trump that has shown spectacular performance since his purchase in February 2026. It makes custom AI chips, networking solutions, and semiconductor products designed for hyperscalers and data centers. Its customers include the world’s largest cloud and technology companies including Google, Amazon, and other major hyperscalers that are increasingly turning to custom ASICs as a more cost-effective way to scale computing power for AI clusters.

Trump isn’t the only fan of Marvell Technology (NASDAQ:MRVL). Recently, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang publicly endorsed Marvell as a potential trillion-dollar company, causing the stock to surge 45% in a single week. Nvidia also made a $2 billion strategic investment in Marvell, and the two companies are collaborating on NVLink Fusion, which makes Marvell’s custom XPUs compatible with Nvidia’s broader AI infrastructure stack including Vera CPUs, ConnectX NICs, BlueField DPUs, and Spectrum-X switches.

But beyond the Huang factor, there are strong fundamental growth catalysts for Marvell Technology (NASDAQ:MRVL). The company recently unveiled the first switch operating at a record speed of 102.4 Tbps designed for AI clusters, delivering energy savings of up to 25% compared to competitors. It also acquired Polariton Technologies to strengthen its photonics-based optical solutions, and has secured over 10 XPU attach program wins with custom revenue expected to grow 20% year-over-year in FY2027, doubling again in FY2028, and nearly tripling by FY2029 towards more than $10 billion.

Sound Shore Fund stated the following regarding Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) in its Q1 2026 investor letter:

“A bright spot in the tech space was our holding in Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL). The company designs custom chips that are both flexible and efficient, a competitive advantage we believe will help Marvell take market share and grow rapidly over the next few years. While many debated whether management could effectively scale up the business and compete, we were able to .... (Click Here to Read the Letter in Detail).”

While we acknowledge the potential of MRVL as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock.

READ NEXT: 33 Stocks That Should Double in 3 Years and Cathie Wood 2026 Portfolio: 10 Best Stocks to Buy.

level2_keywords.meaning: 「超大規模資料中心業者」或「超大型雲端服務供應商」。指那些營運龐大雲端基礎設施，提供大規模運算、儲存和網路服務的公司，如Google、Amazon、Microsoft等。
level2_keywords.example: 「Major hyperscalers are investing heavily in custom AI chips to meet the surging demand for AI workloads.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 「特殊應用積體電路」。這是一種專為特定用途設計的晶片，相較於通用型晶片，它在特定任務上能提供更高的效率和更低的功耗。
level2_keywords.example: 「Companies like Marvell are developing custom ASICs for AI clusters, offering a cost-effective scaling solution.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 「策略性投資」。指企業為了達成長期策略目標（例如市場擴張、技術合作、供應鏈整合等）而進行的投資，通常不只著眼於短期財務回報。
level2_keywords.example: 「Nvidia's $2 billion strategic investment in Marvell aims to integrate their technologies for a stronger AI ecosystem.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 「基礎設施堆疊」。在科技領域，這指的是構成一個系統或服務所需的所有硬體和軟體層次，從底層的晶片、伺服器到上層的作業系統、應用程式等。
level2_keywords.example: 「Marvell's XPUs are designed to be compatible with Nvidia's broader AI infrastructure stack, ensuring seamless integration.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 「成長催化劑」。指能刺激或加速公司業務、營收或股價成長的因素或事件。
level2_keywords.example: 「Beyond celebrity endorsements, Marvell's new product innovations serve as strong fundamental growth catalysts.」

english_professor_news.level2_context:
「各位同學，這篇新聞主要在探討美滿電子科技（Marvell Technology）這家公司，為何能受到像唐納·川普和輝達執行長黃仁勳這樣的重量級人物青睞，並展現出強勁的成長動能。

從宏觀角度來看，這反映了當前全球科技產業，特別是AI領域的幾個重要趨勢：

首先，『AI運算需求的爆炸性成長』：隨著AI應用越來越普及，對高效能、低功耗運算能力的需求也隨之飆升。這使得超大規模資料中心業者（hyperscalers）開始尋求更客製化、更有效率的解決方案，而『特殊應用積體電路（ASICs）』正是滿足這種需求的關鍵。美滿電子在客製化AI晶片和網路解決方案上的專長，正好切中這個市場痛點。

其次，『產業巨頭的策略佈局』：輝達對美滿電子的20億美元『策略性投資』，以及兩家公司在NVLink Fusion上的合作，顯示了AI產業鏈上下游整合的趨勢。輝達希望透過與美滿電子的合作，將其客製化XPU整合到更廣泛的『AI基礎設施堆疊』中，進一步鞏固其在AI生態系中的領導地位。這也說明了，在AI時代，單打獨鬥不如強強聯手。

第三，『技術創新是核心』：新聞中提到美滿電子推出102.4 Tbps的交換器，以及收購Polariton Technologies強化光學解決方案，都證明了持續的技術創新才是公司長期發展的『成長催化劑』。這些技術進步不僅提升了產品性能，也帶來了顯著的能源效率優勢，這在資料中心營運成本日益高昂的今天，是極具吸引力的賣點。

最後，這篇報導也觸及了投資市場對AI股的熱情，以及一些政治經濟因素（如川普的偏好、關稅和產業回流趨勢）可能對特定公司帶來的影響。總體而言，美滿電子是AI時代下，基礎設施層面關鍵技術供應商的一個縮影，其發展動向值得我們持續關注。」

level3_translation.sentence: Marvell Technology (NASDAQ:MRVL) is another favorite stock of Donald Trump that has shown spectacular performance since his purchase in February 2026.
level3_translation.translation: 「美滿電子科技（Marvell Technology，那斯達克代碼：MRVL）是唐納·川普另一檔心頭好股票，自從他在2026年2月買進以來，表現一直非常亮眼。」

level3_translation.sentence: It makes custom AI chips, networking solutions, and semiconductor products designed for hyperscalers and data centers.
level3_translation.translation: 「這家公司主要生產客製化AI晶片、網路解決方案以及專為超大規模資料中心（hyperscalers）和一般資料中心設計的半導體產品。」

level3_translation.sentence: Its customers include the world’s largest cloud and technology companies including Google, Amazon, and other major hyperscalers that are increasingly turning to custom ASICs as a more cost-effective way to scale computing power for AI clusters.
level3_translation.translation: 「它的客戶涵蓋全球最大的雲端與科技巨頭，像是Google、亞馬遜，以及其他主要超大規模資料中心業者，這些業者正日益轉向採用客製化ASIC晶片，作為更具成本效益的方式來擴展AI叢集的運算能力。」

level3_translation.sentence: Trump isn’t the only fan of Marvell Technology (NASDAQ:MRVL).
level3_translation.translation: 「川普並不是美滿電子科技（MRVL）唯一的粉絲。」

level3_translation.sentence: Recently, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang publicly endorsed Marvell as a potential trillion-dollar company, causing the stock to surge 45% in a single week.
level3_translation.translation: 「最近，輝達（Nvidia）執行長黃仁勳公開力挺美滿電子科技，稱其有潛力成為一家兆元級公司，這使得該公司股價在一週內飆漲了45%。」

level3_translation.sentence: Nvidia also made a $2 billion strategic investment in Marvell, and the two companies are collaborating on NVLink Fusion, which makes Marvell’s custom XPUs compatible with Nvidia’s broader AI infrastructure stack including Vera CPUs, ConnectX NICs, BlueField DPUs, and Spectrum-X switches.
level3_translation.translation: 「輝達也對美滿電子科技進行了20億美元的策略性投資，兩家公司正在合作開發NVLink Fusion技術，這項技術能讓美滿電子的客製化XPU與輝達更廣泛的AI基礎設施堆疊相容，包括Vera CPU、ConnectX NICs、BlueField DPU以及Spectrum-X交換器。」

level3_translation.sentence: But beyond the Huang factor, there are strong fundamental growth catalysts for Marvell Technology (NASDAQ:MRVL).
level3_translation.translation: 「但除了黃仁勳效應之外，美滿電子科技（MRVL）本身也具備強勁的基本面成長催化劑。」

level3_translation.sentence: The company recently unveiled the first switch operating at a record speed of 102.4 Tbps designed for AI clusters, delivering energy savings of up to 25% compared to competitors.
level3_translation.translation: 「這家公司最近發表了全球首款專為AI叢集設計、運作速度高達102.4 Tbps的交換器，相較於競爭對手，能節省高達25%的能源。」

level3_translation.sentence: It also acquired Polariton Technologies to strengthen its photonics-based optical solutions, and has secured over 10 XPU attach program wins with custom revenue expected to grow 20% year-over-year in FY2027, doubling again in FY2028, and nearly tripling by FY2029 towards more than $10 billion.
level3_translation.translation: 「美滿電子還收購了Polariton Technologies，以強化其基於光子學的光學解決方案，並已獲得超過10個XPU附掛專案的訂單，預計客製化營收將在2027財年年增20%，2028財年再次翻倍，到2029財年更將接近三倍，朝著超過100億美元的目標邁進。」

level3_translation.sentence: Sound Shore Fund stated the following regarding Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) in its Q1 2026 investor letter:
level3_translation.translation: 「Sound Shore基金在其2026年第一季的投資人信函中，針對美滿電子科技公司（NASDAQ:MRVL）發表了以下看法：」

level3_translation.sentence: “A bright spot in the tech space was our holding in Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL).
level3_translation.translation: 「『在科技領域中，我們持有的美滿電子科技公司（NASDAQ:MRVL）是一個亮點。』」

level3_translation.sentence: The company designs custom chips that are both flexible and efficient, a competitive advantage we believe will help Marvell take market share and grow rapidly over the next few years.
level3_translation.translation: 「『這家公司設計的客製化晶片兼具彈性與效率，我們相信這項競爭優勢將幫助美滿電子在未來幾年內搶佔市佔率並快速成長。』」

level3_translation.sentence: While many debated whether management could effectively scale up the business and compete, we were able to .... (Click Here to Read the Letter in Detail).”
level3_translation.translation: 「『儘管許多人曾質疑管理層能否有效擴大業務規模並參與競爭，但我們能夠……（點擊此處閱讀信函詳情）。』」

level3_translation.sentence: While we acknowledge the potential of MRVL as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk.
level3_translation.translation: 「雖然我們認可美滿電子（MRVL）作為一項投資的潛力，但我們認為某些AI股票能提供更大的上漲潛力，且伴隨較低的下行風險。」

level3_translation.sentence: If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock.
level3_translation.translation: 「如果您正在尋找一檔極度被低估、且有望從川普時代關稅和產業回流趨勢中顯著受益的AI股票，請參閱我們關於『最佳短期AI股票』的免費報告。」

level3_translation.sentence: READ NEXT: 33 Stocks That Should Double in 3 Years and Cathie Wood 2026 Portfolio: 10 Best Stocks to Buy.
level3_translation.translation: 「延伸閱讀：『3年內有望翻倍的33檔股票』以及『凱西·伍德2026年投資組合：10檔最佳買入股票』。」

english_professor_news.title: Amkor Soared on a Taiwan Semi Deal. How to Play AMKR Stock Here.

level1_blind.text:
Amkor Technology (AMKR) has surged into the spotlight after announcing a landmark 10-year partnership with Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited (TSM), a deal that positions the company at the center of America’s push to build a complete domestic semiconductor supply chain.

Under the agreement, TSMC will source advanced packaging and testing services from Amkor’s expanding Arizona operations, creating a critical link between leading-edge chip fabrication and final packaging for artificial intelligence (AI), data center, and high-performance computing applications. Investors quickly embraced the news, sending AMKR shares sharply higher as the partnership strengthens Amkor’s long-term revenue visibility and strategic importance in the fast-growing advanced packaging market.

Mark Cuban Says the Stock Market Makes Guys Like Elon Musk ‘Insanely Rich’ — But Eliminating Billionaires Would Trigger the ‘Worst Depression’ Ever Seen

The rally is about more than a single contract. Advanced packaging has become one of the most important bottlenecks in semiconductor manufacturing, especially for AI accelerators and next-generation computing chips. With major customers increasingly seeking U.S.-based production capabilities, Amkor is emerging as a key beneficiary of industry trends, supported by its Arizona expansion and growing relationships with leading chipmakers.

Does the recent breakout mark the beginning of a sustained growth story or has AMKR stock already priced in much of the good news?

Amkor Technology is one of the world’s largest providers of outsourced semiconductor assembly and test (OSAT) services, offering advanced packaging, wafer-level processing, and testing solutions for leading chipmakers serving the communications, computing, automotive, industrial, and consumer electronics markets. Headquartered in Tempe, Arizona, Amkor operates a global manufacturing footprint across Asia, Europe, and the U.S. and plays a critical role in the semiconductor supply chain by helping customers bring advanced chips to market. Amkor has a market cap of $21.43 billion.

Amkor Technology has been one of the semiconductor sector’s standout performers in 2026, with the stock surging to a new 52-week high of $96.68 on June 16 after the company announced a landmark 10-year advanced packaging partnership with TSMC. Investor enthusiasm surrounding the deal, which strengthens Amkor’s position in the rapidly growing AI and advanced packaging markets, fueled a powerful rally in the shares.

The momentum accelerated over the past week, with AMKR gaining 24.2% in just the past five trading sessions. Moreover, the stock jumped 9.4% on June 11 and added another 8.7% on June 12 as investors reacted to growing optimism about the company’s long-term growth prospects and expanding role in the U.S. semiconductor supply chain. The rally continued into the following week, culminating in a fresh 52-week high on June 16.

level2_keywords.meaning: 半導體，是現代電子產品的核心材料，用於製造積體電路。
level2_keywords.example: The new factory will produce advanced semiconductors for AI applications.

level2_keywords.meaning: 封裝，在半導體製造中，是指將晶片保護起來並連接到外部電路的製程，對晶片效能至關重要。
level2_keywords.example: Advanced packaging is crucial for improving the performance and efficiency of modern chips.

level2_keywords.meaning: 製造、晶圓製造，特指半導體晶片在晶圓廠中的生產過程。
level2_keywords.example: Chip fabrication plants, or fabs, require massive investments and highly specialized equipment.

level2_keywords.meaning: 委外半導體封裝與測試服務（Outsourced Semiconductor Assembly and Test），指將晶片封裝和測試業務外包給專業廠商。
level2_keywords.example: Amkor is a leading OSAT provider, offering critical services to chipmakers worldwide.

level2_keywords.meaning: 市值（Market Capitalization），指一家上市公司所有流通股的總價值，是衡量公司規模的重要指標。
level2_keywords.example: The company's market cap surged after the announcement of the new partnership.

english_professor_news.level2_context: 各位同學，這則新聞的背景脈絡非常重要。我們都知道，美國政府近年來積極推動半導體供應鏈的『去風險化』與『本土化』，希望減少對海外，特別是亞洲地區的依賴。台積電在美國亞利桑那州設廠，正是這一策略的關鍵一步。而安靠科技（Amkor）作為全球領先的委外半導體封測（OSAT）服務供應商，與台積電達成這項十年合作協議，意味著美國本土的半導體製造生態系正在逐步完善。這不僅能確保美國在AI、資料中心等高科技領域的晶片供應安全，也讓安靠科技在先進封裝這個日益重要的環節中，戰略地位大幅提升。先進封裝技術對於提升晶片效能、降低功耗至關重要，尤其在AI晶片領域更是瓶頸所在。因此，這項合作不僅對兩家公司是利多，更是美國半導體產業鏈重塑的重要里程碑，也解釋了為何安靠股價會因此飆升。

level3_translation.sentence: Amkor Technology (AMKR) has surged into the spotlight after announcing a landmark 10-year partnership with Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited (TSM), a deal that positions the company at the center of America’s push to build a complete domestic semiconductor supply chain.
level3_translation.translation: 安靠科技（AMKR）在宣布與台積電（TSM）達成一項具里程碑意義的十年合作夥伴關係後，一躍成為市場焦點，這項協議讓安靠科技在美國推動建立完整本土半導體供應鏈的策略中，扮演核心角色。

level3_translation.sentence: Under the agreement, TSMC will source advanced packaging and testing services from Amkor’s expanding Arizona operations, creating a critical link between leading-edge chip fabrication and final packaging for artificial intelligence (AI), data center, and high-performance computing applications.
level3_translation.translation: 根據這項協議，台積電將從安靠科技在亞利桑那州擴張的營運據點採購先進封裝與測試服務，為人工智慧（AI）、資料中心及高效能運算應用，在尖端晶片製造與最終封裝之間建立關鍵連結。

level3_translation.sentence: Investors quickly embraced the news, sending AMKR shares sharply higher as the partnership strengthens Amkor’s long-term revenue visibility and strategic importance in the fast-growing advanced packaging market.
level3_translation.translation: 投資人迅速看好這項消息，推升安靠科技的股價大幅上漲，因為這項合作夥伴關係強化了安靠科技在快速成長的先進封裝市場中的長期營收能見度與策略重要性。

level3_translation.sentence: Mark Cuban Says the Stock Market Makes Guys Like Elon Musk ‘Insanely Rich’ — But Eliminating Billionaires Would Trigger the ‘Worst Depression’ Ever Seen
level3_translation.translation: 馬克·庫班表示，股市讓像伊隆·馬斯克這樣的人『超級有錢』，但如果消滅億萬富翁，將會引發『史上最嚴重的經濟大蕭條』。

level3_translation.sentence: The rally is about more than a single contract.
level3_translation.translation: 這次股價上漲不只是一紙合約那麼簡單。

level3_translation.sentence: Advanced packaging has become one of the most important bottlenecks in semiconductor manufacturing, especially for AI accelerators and next-generation computing chips.
level3_translation.translation: 先進封裝已成為半導體製造中最重要的瓶頸之一，特別是對人工智慧加速器和下一代運算晶片而言。

level3_translation.sentence: With major customers increasingly seeking U.S.-based production capabilities, Amkor is emerging as a key beneficiary of industry trends, supported by its Arizona expansion and growing relationships with leading chipmakers.
level3_translation.translation: 隨著主要客戶越來越傾向尋求美國本土的生產能力，安靠科技憑藉其在亞利桑那州的擴張以及與領先晶片製造商日益增長的合作關係，正成為產業趨勢的關鍵受惠者。

level3_translation.sentence: Does the recent breakout mark the beginning of a sustained growth story or has AMKR stock already priced in much of the good news?
level3_translation.translation: 這次近期突破是標誌著持續成長故事的開端，還是安靠科技的股價已經消化了大部分利多消息？

level3_translation.sentence: Amkor Technology is one of the world’s largest providers of outsourced semiconductor assembly and test (OSAT) services, offering advanced packaging, wafer-level processing, and testing solutions for leading chipmakers serving the communications, computing, automotive, industrial, and consumer electronics markets.
level3_translation.translation: 安靠科技是全球最大的委外半導體封裝與測試（OSAT）服務供應商之一，為通訊、運算、汽車、工業和消費電子市場的領先晶片製造商提供先進封裝、晶圓級製程和測試解決方案。

level3_translation.sentence: Headquartered in Tempe, Arizona, Amkor operates a global manufacturing footprint across Asia, Europe, and the U.S. and plays a critical role in the semiconductor supply chain by helping customers bring advanced chips to market.
level3_translation.translation: 安靠科技總部位於亞利桑那州坦佩市，在全球亞洲、歐洲和美國設有製造據點，透過協助客戶將先進晶片推向市場，在半導體供應鏈中扮演關鍵角色。

level3_translation.sentence: Amkor has a market cap of $21.43 billion.
level3_translation.translation: 安靠科技的市值為214.3億美元。

level3_translation.sentence: Amkor Technology has been one of the semiconductor sector’s standout performers in 2026, with the stock surging to a new 52-week high of $96.68 on June 16 after the company announced a landmark 10-year advanced packaging partnership with TSMC.
level3_translation.translation: 安靠科技一直是2026年半導體產業的傑出表現者之一，在公司宣布與台積電達成一項具里程碑意義的十年期先進封裝合作夥伴關係後，其股價於6月16日飆升至每股96.68美元的52週新高。

level3_translation.sentence: Investor enthusiasm surrounding the deal, which strengthens Amkor’s position in the rapidly growing AI and advanced packaging markets, fueled a powerful rally in the shares.
level3_translation.translation: 投資人對這項交易的熱情，強化了安靠科技在快速成長的人工智慧和先進封裝市場中的地位，進一步推動了股價的強勁上漲。

level3_translation.sentence: The momentum accelerated over the past week, with AMKR gaining 24.2% in just the past five trading sessions.
level3_translation.translation: 過去一週，這股動能持續加速，安靠科技的股價在過去五個交易日內就上漲了24.2%。

level3_translation.sentence: Moreover, the stock jumped 9.4% on June 11 and added another 8.7% on June 12 as investors reacted to growing optimism about the company’s long-term growth prospects and expanding role in the U.S. semiconductor supply chain.
level3_translation.translation: 此外，由於投資人對公司長期成長前景以及在美國半導體供應鏈中擴大角色的樂觀情緒日益增長，該股在6月11日上漲9.4%，並在6月12日再上漲8.7%。

level3_translation.sentence: The rally continued into the following week, culminating in a fresh 52-week high on June 16.
level3_translation.translation: 這波漲勢持續到接下來的一週，最終在6月16日創下新的52週新高。

market_linker_insight.violence_connection: 今日台股籌碼動向，在國際科技財經新聞的暴力聯結下，清晰揭示了全球資金對AI供應鏈「核心價值」的戰略性再配置。Meta執行長祖克柏承諾的「個人超級智慧」願景，以及高達1450億美元的巨額資本支出，加上Marvell在客製化AI晶片、高速網路與光學解決方案上的突破性進展，無疑為AI基礎設施的爆炸性需求注入強心針。尤其Amkor與台積電長達十年的先進封裝合作，更直接點明了後段製程在AI晶片瓶頸中的關鍵戰略地位。在此宏觀背景下，外資與自營商同步大舉買進聯電、力積電等晶圓代工廠，以及京元電子、力成等封測大廠，這絕非偶然。這反映了市場大戶對AI晶片需求激增將帶動整體半導體供應鏈的精準預判，資金正暴力湧入那些能提供關鍵製程與封測服務的廠商，進行「提前部署」或「順勢加碼」。然而，外資卻同步大賣AI伺服器組裝大廠緯創與鴻海，同時投信也減碼台積電，這或許是資金從「已漲多」或「相對下游組裝環節」轉向「更具爆發潛力」或「尚未完全反映利多」的晶片製造與先進封測環節。這是一場對AI供應鏈價值鏈的深度重估與權重調整，將資金從下游組裝轉移至上游關鍵技術，以捕捉AI浪潮中更深層次的利潤。這場資金的暴力聯結，揭示了市場對AI未來發展路徑的精準押注與風險管理。
